reason: All acceptance criteria verified. PromptInjectionDefense.check_input returns SecurityCheckResult(is_safe, blocked_reason, risk_level). Detects 10 case-insensitive regex patterns. NFKC normalization before pattern matching. Any pattern match -> is_safe=False, risk_level=high. build_sandwich_prompt has 4 sections ending with system reminder. All 26/26 tests pass. Coverage 100%.
